  • RSA

  • Stream

Sabaton

Sabaton is a cryptography toolkit for experimenting with classical and modern ciphers. Select a cipher from the left sidebar to begin.

The system connects a C cryptographic backend with a simple web interface. Each tool allows you to enter cipher text and parameters and immediately run decryption or analysis.

  • Select a cipher from the sidebar
  • Enter ciphertext and parameters
  • Run the decoder
  • View results instantly
© 2026 Sabaton
